title: arachis prostrata subsp. hagenbeckii
intro: Arachis prostrata subsp. hagenbeckii, also known as the Hagenbeck's peanut or Hagenbeck's groundnut, is a subspecies of the wild peanut plant that is native to Africa. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Arachis prostrata subsp. hagenbeckii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. It can be prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tea, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
